where.if: and ( stu_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or stu_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
select id, stu_no, stu_name, gender, age, class_name, height, weight, round(weight / pow(height / 100, 2), 1) as bmi, score from stu_info
order by score asc, id desc
order by score desc, id desc
order by id desc
limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select count(1) as total_count, sum(case when score >= 0 and score <= 60 then 1 else 0 end) as failing_count, sum(case when score > 60 then 1 else 0 end) as passing_count, ifnull(round(sum(case when score > 60 then 1 else 0 end) * 100 / nullif(count(1), 0), 1), 0) as pass_rate from stu_info
select id, stu_no, stu_name, gender, age, class_name, height, weight, round(weight / pow(height / 100, 2), 1) as bmi, score from stu_info where stu_no = #{stuNo}
mapper.insert: insert into stu_info (stu_no, stu_name, gender, age, class_name, height, weight, score) values (#{stuNo}, #{stuName}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{className}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{score})
mapper.update: update stu_info set stu_name = #{stuName}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, class_name = #{className}, height = #{height}, weight = #{weight}, score = #{score} where stu_no = #{stuNo}
